name: Snipe-IT
description: Open-source IT asset management platform. Monitor hardware assets, users, and licenses for compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Snipe-IT instance
2. Click your name (top-right) → Manage API Keys
3. Create a new Personal Access Token
4. Copy the token
5. Enter your Snipe-IT URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.snipeitapp.com) and the token below

credentialFields.label: Snipe-IT Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Snipe-IT URL (e.g. 'https://yourcompany.snipeitapp.com' or your self-hosted URL). No trailing slash.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Snipe-IT → Admin → User Profile → Manage API Keys → Create New Token.

checks.name: Snipe-IT App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Snipe-IT API is accessible.

checks.name: Snipe-IT Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access by listing Snipe-IT users.

checks.name: Snipe-IT Asset Inventory
checks.description: Verifies hardware asset inventory is maintained in Snipe-IT.
